name: Water Bottle
title: Water Bottle
flavor: You rationed it too long. Drinking it now costs you something else.
text: [1 slot. Restore 2 Drive, discard. On use: trigger one held Misery if any.]

name: First Aid Kit
title: First Aid Kit
flavor: Sealed. Fully stocked. Someone packed this carefully.
text: [1 slot. Restore 3 Drive, discard. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Compass
title: Compass
flavor: Doesn't tell you what's ahead. Just which way you're going.
text: [1 slot. Once per Run: look ahead 1 card. No skip available.]

name: Lighter
title: Lighter
text: [0 slots. Reduce next event cost by 1, discard. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Energy Bar
title: Energy Bar
flavor: Tastes like nothing. Does the job.
text: [1 slot each. Restore 1 Drive per use, discard. Carry up to 3.]

name: Crowbar
title: Crowbar
flavor: Useful in ways you'd rather not think about.
text: [1 slot. Reduce any event cost by 1 per use.]

name: Rope
title: Rope
flavor: Twenty feet. More than enough for most things.
text: [1 slot. Bypass one obstacle event, discard. On forced discard: spend 1 Luck to keep instead.]

name: Flashlight
title: Flashlight
flavor: The batteries won't last. Use it when it counts.
text: [1 slot. Reduce next event cost by 2, discard.]

name: Sleeping Bag
title: Sleeping Bag
flavor: Leaving it behind is harder than it should be.
text: [2 slots. Restore 3 Drive, discard. On voluntary discard: draw Misery.]

name: Pocket Knife
title: Pocket Knife
flavor: Small enough to forget you have it. Until you need it.
text: [0 slots. Reduce any event cost by 1, discard.]

name: Backpack
title: Backpack
flavor: Someone's name is written inside. You don't read it.
text: [1 slot. Grants 3 extra slots for Run. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Painkillers
title: Painkillers
flavor: More than you should take. Less than you want to.
text: [1 slot. Restore 1 Drive. Draw Luck. Discard.]
